permission_list.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the role {{role}}?

accounts.delete_modal_message: This user will be permanently deleted. Are you sure you want to delete this user?
accounts.activate_modal_message: This user will be activated. Are you sure you want to activate this user?
accounts.deactivate_modal_message: This user will be disabled. Are you sure you want to disable this user?
accounts.activate_and_reset_password_modal_messag: This user is disabled. Are you sure you want to activate this user and send the password reset email?
accounts.activate_user_error: An error occurred while activating the user.

modal.connect_user: Link to employees from HR app
modal.connect_user_description: As a user of the HR app, you can directly select one of your employees to link the account to an employee and fill in the data
modal.connect_user_warning: User data will be filled by Employee application
modal.empty_fields_error: Please fill out all required fields
modal.no_role_error: Please select at least one role

my_profile_page.activate_two_factor: Activate two factor authentication for this account

enable_two_factor_modal.item1_text: In order to activate two-step verification on Innos, you must have an authenticator application on your mobile device.
enable_two_factor_modal.item2_text: Read the qr code through the authenticator app on your mobile device.
enable_two_factor_modal.item3_text: After reading the QR code, enter the one-time password you see on your mobile device.

disable_two_factor_modal.title: Deactivate
disable_two_factor_modal.code_label: Enter the code from your email

logout_confirmation_modal.header: Are you sure you want to log out from all accounts?

application_settings_page.reset_modules: All settings on this page will be set to their default values. Are you sure you want to reset?

notifications_directory.Show or hide comments & history tab insi: Show or hide comments & history tab inside the employee modal communication tab
notifications_directory.Enable or disable notifications for even: Enable or disable notifications for events which I am invited

integrations_page.disconnect_sso: This will disconnect from {{app}} SSO and remove the settings. Are you sure you want to disconnect?

github.description: GitHub is a code hosting platform for version control and collaboration. It lets you and others work together on projects from anywhere.

gitlab.description: GitLab is a web-based Git repository that provides free open and private repositories, issue-following capabilities, and wikis.

zoom.description: Zoom is a video conferencing platform that enables users to connect online for meetings, webinars, and collaborative projects. It offers features like screen sharing, real-time messaging, and virtual backgrounds to enhance remote communication.

microsoft_team.description: Microsoft Teams is a collaboration platform that offers chat, video meetings, and file integration within Microsoft 365. It enhances teamwork with tools for communication and productivity.

sign_now.description: SignNow is a cloud-based provider of electronic signature technology, developed in the United States. The company's software-as-a-service platform is intended for individuals and businesses to sign, and manage documents from any computer.

okta.description: Okta SSO is a cloud service that enables single sign-on access to multiple applications with one set of credentials. It simplifies and secures user authentication.
